meta.title: Urban Kit – Method Archive
meta.description: A collection of methods and tools for urban projects.

home.title: Method Archive
home.subtitle: Discover and filter our collection of methods for urban projects.
home.intro1: Ensure that all participants can communicate respectfully and on equal footing at every interaction.
home.intro2: Clarify in advance whether support services such as interpreters are needed so that all participants can follow and contribute to the discussion.
home.intro3: You can ask participants to write their names and pronouns on a name tag or tape and wear it visibly. This can support a respectful, open, and welcoming atmosphere. So always bring tape and markers.
home.intro4: Make sure you always have a way to take notes (laptop, tablet, pen and paper) to document discussions.
home.intro5: Suitable venue: sufficiently large room with good acoustics, seating available
